headline: Marathon (MPC) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Late in the first quarter, geopolitical events tightened global markets, disrupted trade flows, and drove global cracks higher.  While estimates vary, we believe approximately 6 million barrels per day, representing close to 6% of global refined products capacity has come offline during the conflict in the Middle East.
